situation: SZ-SP-L-001 (audit-2026-07-07-047): handleRegionsChange useCallback captures deletedStack in closure. When user deletes a text then adjusts region within same React render cycle, the async refilter callback reads stale deletedStack=[] → deleted text reappears. Prior SH-M-005 fix changed key strategy to VerifiedText.id but did not address the underlying stale-closure race.
action: Add useRef mirror (deletedStackRef) synced via useEffect. handleRegionsChange reads deletedStackRef.current instead of closure-captured deletedStack; remove deletedStack from useCallback deps to prevent callback recreation on every delete (which would also re-render ImageWithOverlay). Direct-edit in worktree via case-104 escape hatch because cp-guard detected divergence (prior unmerged SZ-SP-M-* commits on opt-sidepanel-1782907225).
outcome_evidence: commit 3aaa4a6 on auto/opt-sidepanel-1782907225 pushed to origin. tsc --noEmit shows no errors in SidePanelApp.tsx (pre-existing TS2339 in background/index.ts:75 unrelated — from prior SZ-SP-M-004 requestId addition). diff: +15/-3 lines adding deletedStackRef declaration, sync useEffect, and 3 read-site replacements inside handleRegionsChange.
next_suggestion: Next pending route-fix: SZ-SP-L-002 (handleDeleteText stale closure — rapid deletes undo each other, same root cause pattern as SZ-SP-L-001). After that SZ-PP-L-002 (testVisionConnection no timeout).

audit_findings.finding: SZ-SP-L-001: handleRegionsChange captures deletedStack state in useCallback closure. Async chrome.runtime.sendMessage('refilter') awaits response; if user triggers delete+region-adjust within same render tick, callback reads pre-delete deletedStack snapshot → reapplies filter without the just-deleted item → deleted text reappears.
audit_findings.remediation: Mirror deletedStack into useRef; read ref.current inside callback; remove deletedStack from deps array.
